Appearance

Diamond AnalyticsHelp Center

Baseball and softball player analytics for youth coaches

Get Started
View App
⚾

Score Games and Practices

Log every pitch, at-bat, fielding play, and baserunning event in real time using manual entry or voice logging.

📊

Analytics That Drive Development

Heat maps, spray charts, polar accuracy charts, and mechanics assessments give coaches objective data on every player.

🎯

Training Suggestions

The app analyzes player data and automatically suggests training focus areas with drill search powered by YouTube.

🎙️

Voice Logging

Describe plays naturally using your voice. AI interprets the play and logs it to the correct fields automatically.

📋

Coach Notes with AI

Speak or type coaching observations. AI extracts player-specific insights and connects them to training plans.

📄

Player Report Cards

Generate shareable player development reports with stats, charts, mechanics assessments, and coach comments.

Baseball and softball analytics for youth coaches
